title: Das Depu Epu Sea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Das Depu Epu Sea''''', or ''Deep Dark Water'', was an epic poem belonging to the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] culture of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Written in both [[Gungan (language)|Gungan Basic]] and [[Old Gungan/Legends|Old Gungan]], this ode to [[Da Beauty Al' Round|Da Beauty Al'Round]] would make a great impression on a Gungan family if used during the course of a visit.

An excerpt of the poem is as follows (''courtesy of the [[Baobab Archives]]''):

''Oomesa pa Guna mer muda.''

''J'ai [[bongo]] do deepu sea.''

''Mesa hearta go tippy-tap.''

''J'ai bongo do deepu sea.''

''All dha Gunga wail an gnash,''

''No bomba, no crashen...''

''J'ai bongo do deepu sea''

''... Tank yu.''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-07 -->[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]
